headline: Dell Stock Has Very Attractive Short-Put Yields - Over 3.8% for the Next 2 Weeks
summary: Dell Technologies stock still looks undervalued, based on free cash flow analysis and analysts' revenue forecasts. Moreover, shorting 2-week puts at a 6% out-of-the-money (i.e., lower) DELL strike price yields over 3.8%.
